summary: Replaced ftsRowID polynomial hash with FNV-1a 64-bit; injected a NUL boundary between scope and id.
reason: The h*31 polynomial mixed poorly, leaving a measurable collision rate on FTS5 rowids; a collision would cause DELETE WHERE rowid=? before re-insert to delete the wrong resource's FTS entry and silently miss search hits. Closes Greptile finding #4 on PR #624.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/store passes (existing search/index tests cover the path).
